videos.title: Vatternrundan - Cycling around the Vattern lake - 300 km in 12 hours
Vlog: SAVING BIKERS IN DISTRESS!
videos.description:
In today's video me and Kat assist in Vätternrundan 2017. A bicycle rase. Things get bloody!

Follow me on Twitch: http://twitch.tv/shaawcore

Social Media:

http://twitch.tv/shaawcore
http://instagram.com/sonnymikaelsvensson

Arreat Summit:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/5DalnffjaasIGgYUTD5EN5
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ArreatSummit/?fref=ts
Instagram: http://instagram.com/arreatsummit

Thanks for watching!
Don't forget to subscribe!
